name: Adept of the White Robes
description: You learn one 2nd-level Abjuration or Divination spell and can cast it once per long rest without a spell slot, or using your spell slots. Additionally, as a reaction when you or a creature within 30 feet takes damage, you can expend a spell slot to reduce the damage by a number of d6s equal to the spell level plus your spellcasting ability modifier.
